hero.title: Chris Hemmings
hero.lead: I specialise in working with men who want to make sense of their lives, their relationships and their emotional experiences.

about.title: A little about me
about.body:
I offer one-to-one therapy in person and online, working with people from all walks of life to explore relationships, identity, anxiety, addiction and more.

I am the founder of both **Men's Therapy Hub** and **M-Path** — two organisations focused on actively engaging more men and boys in improving their emotional wellbeing.

Before retraining as a therapist, I spent over a decade as a BBC journalist and documentary maker, telling human stories and challenging unhelpful ideas around masculinity and mental health.

Today, I combine that storytelling expertise with therapeutic insight — offering not only therapy, but also public speaking, workshops and advocacy work across the UK and internationally.

I'm the author of the 2017 book *Be a Man*, focusing on the lasting implications of macho culture on men and boys.

I'm incredibly passionate about supporting men to connect more deeply to themselves and those around them.

interests.title: Areas of specific interest
interests.intro: I have experience working with clients with a wide range of challenges, including:

items.title: Anxiety
items.body: Exploring the roots of worry, overthinking and tension — and finding ways to feel calmer, more grounded and in control.

items.title: Depression
items.body: When life feels heavy or flat, we can create a space for you to reconnect with yourself, your emotions and what brings meaning.

items.title: Anger
items.body: Anger often hides pain, shame or fear. Together we'll unpack where it comes from and how to express it in healthier ways.

items.title: Relationships
items.body: From conflict to communication issues, we'll explore how you relate to others — and to yourself — to create connection in your life.

items.title: Addiction
items.body: Whether it's substances, behaviours or patterns, we'll work to understand what's driving the cycle and how to break it with compassion.

items.title: Masculinity
items.body: If you are questioning what kind of man you want to be, or feeling stuck between expectations and your true self.

items.title: Low self-esteem
items.body: If your inner critic is loud or constant, therapy can help you challenge unhelpful beliefs and build a stronger sense of self.

items.title: Emotional expression
items.body: If you've grown up being told to hide how you feel, we can work to unlearn that and reconnect you with your full emotional range.

speakingPromo.title: Bring this conversation to your workplace
speakingPromo.body: I'm also a keynote speaker and workshop facilitator on men's mental health, masculinity and emotional wellbeing — delivering workplace workshops and talks for employers, schools, universities and conferences.
